    static JsonStream.Event
    JsonStream.Event.stringData(Readable data)
    Get an TYPE_STRING_DATA event with the specified Readable Zero or more events of this type are issued between startString(long) and endString() events Note the parameter is not copied and the underlying array may be reused, so the event should be processed immediately.
    static JsonStream.Event
    JsonStream.Event.stringValue(CharSequence seq, int sizeInBytes)
    Get an TYPE_PRIMITIVE event with the specified string value.

    static JsonStream.Event
